step2.customerArchetype: Neighbors who want quality without pretense — remote workers, dog walkers, parents after drop-off
step2.painPoints: Tired of chain coffee that tastes the same everywhere; wants a local spot that remembers their order
step2.desiredOutcomes: A regular morning ritual and a brand that feels like it belongs on this block

step4.missionStatement: Serve this neighborhood coffee and food we’re proud of, every day.

step5.originSummary: Left a corporate job to open the shop I wished had existed on my own commute.
step5.motivation: Wanted a corner where the coffee is serious but the vibe is still human.

step7.differentiation: Neighborhood pricing and warmth with beans roasted in small batches — no lecture, just a great cup.
